headline: Mbappé's €45M Content Empire Is Rewriting Football Media
dek: France's most recognisable athlete has built a streaming-first production house that just signed its first major global distribution deal — and football clubs are already queuing to licence it.

headline: Erling Haaland Is Building Norway's Boldest Athlete Tech Fund
dek: The world's most lethal striker has quietly deployed €50M into Scandinavian health tech and climate infrastructure — and the fund is just getting started.

headline: Gerard Piqué Is Rebuilding Football From the Ground Up
dek: Kings League has gone from a viral experiment to a €200M media and sports property.

headline: Lewis Hamilton Is Betting on What Comes After the Podium
dek: From Formula 1 to non-alcoholic spirits and film — Hamilton's off-track empire is accelerating faster than anything he's done behind the wheel.
